query:
SELECT 
  u.id, u.name, u.email,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as cycle_count,
  SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles,
  SUM(ch.correctCount) as total_correct,
  ROUND(SUM(ch.correctCount) * 100.0 / SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 2) as accuracy
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
WHERE ch.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC;
